input.tenant_message: We have absolutely no hot water in the entire apartment. The water heater in the closet has a red warning light on and I can smell something slightly odd near it — not like gas exactly, but a bit musty or chemical-like. My roommate and I both can't shower or wash dishes properly. This started this morning and I really need help today.

ai_output.recommended_action: Dispatch a technician immediately to inspect the water heater — the warning light combined with an unusual odor may indicate a failing pilot assembly, gas valve issue, or early signs of tank failure. Do not ignore the odor; if gas is suspected, contact the gas company first. Restore hot water service same day if possible.
